title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: They will deliver the furniture tomorrow afternoon.
‘I'll pay for the coffee,’ said Mark.
If you don't take your umbrella, you'll get wet.
I am sure they were very happy to see you.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect for certain past deduction.

questions.firstSentence: I didn't know about the party until I arrived at the office.
questions.explanation: Tests cleft sentences (It was only when...).
questions.secondSentence: It (1) _________ I arrived at the office that I knew about the party.

questions.firstSentence: I find it hard to understand his accent.
